raw_text: juan fernández fernández 690 302 779 e juan.fdez.fernandez@gmail.com e november 2, 1988 c/mallorca 1, 4a e leganés (madrid), spain 28913 experience quality engineer for alten spain sept 2016 - present in situ support for airbus quality engineering airframe rfe (full time contract). e running sqcp boards along with design teams. e support design teams on the aplication of pps methodologies e support map or plant engineering in quality and lean issues e assuring, managing and monitoring design quality checks e supporting and/or leading pps, quality gates and milestone reviews (fda, ffr etc.) e dqns weekly meetings (integrated team for design issues) to discuss design solutions and avoid ncs e managing, improving and developing kpls intership at airbus operations april 2016 - sept 2016 quality activities support for quality engineering airframe rfe (full time contract). academic background aeronautical engineering, speciality space vehicles 2006-2016 e.t.s.i. aeronáuticos, universidad politécnica de madrid. master thesis on rocket design for microgravity experimentation. aditional education catia v5 course 2014 universidad politécnica de madrid (u.p.m). managment of ingeneering and energetic projets course 2014 universidad politécnica de madrid (u.p.m). introduction to nastran course 2014 universidad politécnica de madrid (u.p.m). local engineering competition 2011 team design competition organized by best-upm, madrid. winner of all you can fly contest 2010 organized by the l.e.e.m. experimental category. member of the catsat team. paticipation in the c*space and cansat contest 2010 organized by c.n.e.s.
